productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Black Zapotec Casual Shoes
description: Take style to the next level in these fabulous casual shoes from adidas. Constructed for better comfort and cushioning, these shoes are a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Team these with jeans and tees for great urban style.UpperSuede uppers with perforations for better structure and comfortadidas patented 3-Stripe overlays on the sides for enhanced support and to exude the brand&rsquo s belief in performanceMesh padded tongue provides better breathable comfortPadded collar offers better FitLace-up system for a snug, customised fitBrand name printed on the tongue and below the collarHaul loop on the collar for easy removal of the shoeMidsoleSturdy foot-bed provides all day comfort and supportEVA midsole provides better shock absorption and cushioningOutsoleAggressive TPR outsole comprising of multi-directional lugs on the forefoot, heel and periphery of the foot for better gripOutsole extends and builds up to the sides, heel and forefoot to give better grip and protection on all sidesReinforced midfoot arch for better arch support and branding lugs for enhanced tractionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts
